message:
fix(anthropic): force temperature to 1.0 when extended thinking is enabled

The Anthropic API requires temperature=1.0 when thinking/extended
thinking is active. Previously the user-configured temperature was
passed through unconditionally, which could cause API errors or
unexpected behavior when thinking was enabled with a non-1.0 temperature.

Now the temperature is conditionally set: if thinking is Some, force 1.0;
otherwise respect the user's configured value. The corresponding unit
test assertion is updated to expect 1.0 instead of 0.2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
